t.t-elif: domain === 'input_datetime' or domain === 'date' or domain === 'time' or domain === 'datetime'

div.class: switch-controller portal-simple-toggle d-flex align-items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-light rounded

t.t-if: isOn and (attributes.direction !== undefined or attributes.oscillating !== undefined or attributes.preset_modes?.length > 0)

div.class: sensor-controller portal-sensor-display p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-3

div.small: 此裝置類型 () 暫不支援控制功能

div.class: input-boolean-controller portal-simple-toggle d-flex align-items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-light rounded
siren-controller portal-simple-toggle d-flex align-items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-light rounded
text-controller p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-2
select-controller p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-2
datetime-controller p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-2
binary-sensor-controller portal-sensor-display p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-3

i.t-att-class: { 'fa-sun-o text-warning': entityState === 'sunny' || entityState === 'clear-night', 'fa-cloud text-secondary': entityState === 'cloudy' || entityState === 'partlycloudy', 'fa-umbrella text-info': entityState === 'rainy' || entityState === 'pouring', 'fa-snowflake-o text-primary': entityState === 'snowy', 'fa-bolt text-warning': entityState === 'lightning', 'fa-cloud text-muted': !['sunny','clear-night','cloudy','partlycloudy','rainy','pouring','snowy','lightning'].includes(entityState) }

div.class: tracker-controller portal-sensor-display p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-3
calendar-controller p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-3
camera-controller portal-sensor-display p-3 bg-light rounded d-flex align-items-center gap-3
